questionHtml:
Which represents electron affinity?

A.  Al2+ (g) → Al3+ (g) + e−

B.  C (g) + e− → C− (g)

C.  Cl2 (g) → 2Cl (g)

D.  S (s) → S+ (g) + e−

meta.title: Which represents electron affinity? A. Al2+ (g) → Al3+ (g) + e− B. C (g) + e− → C− (g) C. Cl2 (g) → 2Cl (g) D. S (s) → S+ (g) + e−
breadcrumbLabels: Structure 3.1—The periodic table: Classification of elements
Structure 3.1.3—Periodicity refers to trends in properties of elements across a period and down a group.
